name: SCC_ServiceDetailRes
title: SCC_ServiceDetailRes
syntax: void SCC_ServiceDetailRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode, dword ServiceID, long ParameterSetCount )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Service Detail Response is received.
Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
